content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation modules like ICM (used in autonomous agents) can be repurposed to dynamically prioritize which new experiences an active learning agent stores in its long-term memory, outperforming 2024 SOTA memory retention methods that rely on static importance heuristics. This creates a self-tuning memory system where the agent’s own innate curiosity automatically curates a more useful, generalizable memory store for future downstream tasks.
